zh.lifeSummary: 當Marion Thomson於大約1542年出生時，她的父親James Thompson23歲，母親Lady Marion Cochran23歲。她於1549年1月17日與John Alain de Cochrane在蘇格蘭斯林史爾法爾吉可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marion Thomson于大约1542年出生时，她的父亲James Thompson23岁，母亲Lady Marion Cochran23岁。她于1549年1月17日与John Alain de Cochrane在苏格兰斯林史爾法爾吉可结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Thomson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish, English and northern Irish: variant of   Thompson  .
Scottish: sometimes an Anglicized form of Gaelic McThomas; see McTavish , McComish .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Thomsen  . Compare   Thompson  .

variants.name: Thompson
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me) (see Thom ) + -son ‘son of Tom’. Thomson is usually the Scottish form, that with the intrusive -p- being English. Both forms are common in Ireland. The surname Thompson is also very common among African Americans.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German Thomsen and of its Swedish cognate Thomsson. Compare Thomson .

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Marion Thomson was born about 1542, her father, James Thompson, was 23 and her mother, Lady Marion Cochran, was 23. She married John Alain de Cochrane on 17 January 1549, in Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marion Thomson est née environ 1542, son père, James Thompson, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Lady Marion Cochran, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Alain de Cochrane le 17 janvier 1549, à Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marion Thomson um 1542 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Thompson 23 und ihre Mutter Lady Marion Cochran 23. Sie hat am 17. Januar 1549 in Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland John Alain de Cochrane geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marion Thomson è nata il circa 1542, sua padre, James Thompson, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Lady Marion Cochran, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John Alain de Cochrane il 17 gennaio 1549, nel Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marion Thomsonが約1542年に生まれた時，父James Thompsonは23歳，母Lady Marion Cochranは23歳であった。1549年1月17日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアファルキルクでJohn Alain de Cochraneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Marion Thomson(이)가 대략 1542년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Thompson(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Marion Cochran(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1549년 1월 17일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 파커크에서 John Alain de Cochrane(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn., Falkirk, Stirling, Scotland: Falkirk, Striviling, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marion Thomson nasceu aproximadamente 1542, seu pai, James Thompson, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marion Cochran, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John Alain de Cochrane em 17 de janeiro de 1549, em Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marion Thomson родилась около 1542 г., её отцу по имени James Thompson было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Marion Cochran, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Alain de Cochrane 17 января 1549 г. в местности фалкирк, стирлингшир, Шотландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marion Thomson nació aproximadamente 1542, su papá, James Thompson, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Lady Marion Cochran, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John Alain de Cochrane el 17 de enero de 1549, en Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
